headline: 20-Year FICA Tax Credit Carry-Forward Management Preparation Checklist — Boston
articleBody:
20-Year FICA Tax Credit Carry-Forward Management Preparation Checklist for Boston Clients

Before your 20-Year FICA Tax Credit Carry-Forward Management appointment with FICA Tax Credits & Refunds, make sure you have the following ready:

1. Payroll records
2. Tip reports
3. Tax returns
4. Employee w-2s
5. Credit card statements

Contact FICA Tax Credits & Refunds at (213) 537-5613 to get started.
